text: T-Mobile is a scam I went and got service and they said that the phone that I was purchasing was one of their best ones that were free my phone hardly worked I constantly called them to ask them what was going on with my phone all I will get is you need to upgrade you need to upgrade you need to pay this money so that you can upgrade I just got the service what was I going to upgrade for right after getting service I spent about $180 to start the service let alone a month later I'm being told I need to upgrade by spending another $180 or more to get a decent phone nothing I ever said was important enough for them to do anything about it so I ended up leaving T-Mobile and getting a service somewhere else not only that I bumped into one of the people that sold me the phone service at my job and I asked him was he still working there and he said no he quit and I asked him why he said because he didn't like the way that T-Mobile had them treating the customers he told me that they are told to sell services saying the phone is free saying it's a good quality phone and then once you're locked into the contract they have to try to upsell you something later because they know they gave you a terrible phone so it's a scam to get you to pay more money instead of giving you a quality service and phone in the first place I started with Verizon not too long ago and I am extremely happy I spent less money with Verizon than I did with T-Mobile setting up the service I have a brand new phone my phone is great the service is great I get great service when I call in for customer care everything is great with Verizon but with T-Mobile it's a scam do not waste your money on T-Mobile! They won't allow me to put the actual date that I got the service so I'm just going to put whatever date they'll allow me to put on here for the website sake but all the information besides the actual date of service is correct 100%

Bad company.  
I'm selling my t-mobile Samsung galaxy nA13. Who wants its? 230.00. Plug was 45. I paid almost 300. I no longer want to be with t-mobile..  bought it on date shown.  No scratches.

The gentleman’s review next to me is right. I have five lines through T-Mobile. I've been a long time customer. I switch to prepaid about 2.5 years ago leery of late fees that happened with them in the past. My SIM card went out the store told me they could not help me cuz I didn't know my PIN to call the phone number. I never had a proper set up , just one email with phone number. I bought the SIM through amazon and called to activate it. So I called the number with the SIM card. My activation email only shows the phone number as acct. The first agent is asking for an account number. Don’t have it, I told him about about the first activation email and no pin.. An hour later, we were going in circles, they kept telling me that they could help me, yet they were being passive aggressive by saying that I needed to go to the store. So I kept asking them okay so you can't help me , I will hang up, and they  kept saying no don't hang up, I can help you. The second agent lays into me that the phone number is the account number - OKAY,  WELL I DO NOT KNOW THAT YOU CONFUSE YOUR CUSTOMER!!  The person was SO dismissive on the phone with a superior complex it seems. I don't understand why I was treated this way. I did everything right. I gave him all the information and was very direct asking if they could or could not help me. T-Mobile don't keep people on the phone. Don't waste people's time. If your customer service cannot help, tell your customer service to tell that to the customer so they can hang up. I understand that I wasn't helped at the store either, the customer service agent said that they should have helped me. I do not know really WHO was supposed to help but is  too confusing when you pass the buck on the customer. But retainment is not irritating, or upsetting your customer with a customer service agent who is not direct and dismissive. I can not even give feedback to company. Well, if a company does not care about the customers experience it's not a good company anymore right? I'd rather pay more for a company that doesn't pass the buck on the customer.

The customer service team at t mobile is comprised entirely of dolts.I ordered two new phones and an apple watch and set up new service. They shipped my order to my old address despite the rep reading the correct shipping address back to me. I never received the order so I called them. They wanted me to drive 2 hours to the UPS facility near my old address to pick it up. I told them no so they had UPS send it back. It took 6 phone calls and 2 trips to the local t mobile store to get my order resent. Finally I got a phone rep to re ship my order. I received the order which included an iPhone 14 that was supposed to be free with trade in. When I tried to send in my trade I discovered that the rep had neglected to include the trade in as part of the order. I called them once again and was told that I needed to return the new phone so that they could reprocess it with the trade in and send me yet another phone. I am beyond frustrated with my interactions with these people. I am sorry that I ever decided to switch my service.

To whom it may concern, 

 I’m writing to you because I HAD ENOUGH STRESS with TMobil billing department and their anlysts and supervisor specifically their experts/billing/warehouse I’ve been thru hell to get my phones billing after signed up contract with them for phones. Almost three months I’ve been calling TMobile to refund, credit and adjust the bills.  Each time each supervisor told me the billing is taking care and my billing is $81/mo turned out I keep paying more each month until today, they charged me 3 times more and when I talked to the supervisor today, she was so bs helpful. She told me that I have no other out because the return period is over even I want to get out and/or return the devices, I am still paying them for something I am not using it.  Also, they credit me $12.50 for 3 times overcharge and the down payment at the beginning is not credit back to me as they said they will.  Seems NOONE knows how to do it…and/or how to do the calculation.
1. charged $224
2. charged me $198 something in Dec
3. charged again for $180 something within January and adjusted pay for $81.00
4. today they charged $243.08 when 3 phones $27.50/line
5. they told me that b'c I have a hotspot which I told them I don't need hotspot at the beginning and they still send me the sims. I am not activated it and still being charge since they sent me the chrome for FREE.  I told themI don't need hotspot but give me free chrome I will take it. Turned out they charged them all.  I asked the supervisors to send me the RM# and return label and I am happy to mail it back but until now no one sends me anything and the wecko supervisor today told me that I can't return it since the return day is over.   What is the return day over? She said 90 days but since the contract day signed up today is not 90 days yet.  They are not 1. know how to do the calculation. 2. they don't know how to calculate the times/days. 
Can someone from TMobil resolve this issue asap?  I am tired to call the billing each month and each month I received the different billing amount and pay more than my previous carrier.  Why do I need to go with TMobile cost me 3 times more and the network is suck only 2-3 bars frequency and calls dropping all the times.

TRAPPED in T-Mobile T-Mobile Cellular Service has been consistently terrible.
We sit in the middle between multiple 5G towers. We have received a signal booster. In the 3 months we’ve had T-Mobile I have spent at least 5 hours on the phone with various service techs troubleshooting. 3 days ago(Friday) while trying to call customer service from my home, with 4bars signal both wireless and WiFi, my calls dropped 3 times before I was able to talk with someone. We again walked through resetting our 3 month old phone. He was supposed to call me today (Monday) to follow-up. Never happened. Today again dropped calls and texts that won’t go through even with 6-7 attempts, neither with personal nor business line. Call in evening to T-Mobile service met with a recording that I was calling outside of business hours, please try back in the morning. In October 2022 when we started service service call response was pretty prompt. In the last few weeks the wait to person time has become long. Now twice promised call back with no delivery. We wanted to pay out small balance to purchase I-phone 14 when we transferred to T-Mobile in Oct. we were required to carry it in a 2 year contract. This kind of service for 2 years is what we now look forward to? Think twice before contracting with T-Mobile.
Worst service. Big mistake using tmobile.  Couldn't get service in the middle of new york.York.  gonna cancel first thing in the morning!

I Liked them at first- Good pricing, decent coverage and their speeds were getting better- but the last year they have just sucked- the usage logs never update- crap call quality, lackluster speeds and constant outages. I’m ready to grow up and get a real carrier.
Service sucks keeps dropping my service

Many dropped calls lately. Also, logging in to my account, call and message logs have not been updated in over a week. Reported it a week ago. No resolution, no ETA. Terrible service, tremendous incompetence.

Been a customer of T-Mobile for 20 years, spent 10s of thousands of dollars, and always on time with the bill. I call to ask why I have to put a deposit on a phone and they tell me I don't. Just go to the store and if there's any issues, call customer service. The store told me they can't help, they have to go by what the computer says. So I call customer service back and they tell me there's now nothing they can do. Sorry and good luck. I'll be taking my 9 lines elsewhere soon.
What a joke.!!!   Switched to T-mobile 3 months ago and still can't get t-mobile to issue credit card promised per their promotion.

I am not happy with Tmobile. I had a near death experience this weekend and lost my phone, my license, Card, Everything. It's all in the middle of a river in Alabama. When I went in the lady in the store wouldn't help me due to me not having my license. She referred me to call customer support. I called, and the only way I could discontinue my phone service was for them to send me a link to my phone that is in the middle of a freaking river. So, now I have to wait weeks for a new license to come in so that I can cancel my phone that is lost. I am not happy. If I couldnt get a new phone I should be able to at least cancel the service on the one that I dont have. Once I get my information in and get that phone turned off I will never us Tmobile again. This happened in Flowood MS. Thank you.
They can never resolve issues.

I had an internet account and it never worked. So I took the tower back and the account was cancelled by t mobile. Now 8 months later I’m told I owe 88 dollars.. I do not owe anyone anything. They gave me two different accounts. Two different phone numbers. Service I never asked for and I never got service.. it’s on my credit report and T Mobile themselves cancelled the account..

My husband and I switched from Verizon to Tmobile to save money. We saved money but got terrible service as a result. We have nothing but dropped calls, calls that won't go through and texts that won't go through. Somehow we believed that their coverage was as good or better than Verizon. That's not true. We spent a weekend away from home and had zero service for two days! We're going to switch to another provider. I don't recommend them at all!
Tmobile is abusive! They don't help on purpose. Do not.....
T-mobile internet sucks guess that what you get for $50 buffering all the times guess I'll be crawling back to xfinity zero stars for me date of experience every day

After signing up via the web, I soon realized I was totally lied to and very little of what the “salesman” said on the phone was true. So I cancelled within the 10 day window. I Returned the SIM cards at a store and was told I was good to go. I soon received a bill for a monthly charge that was no where near what I was told on the phone. I called customer service and after a 45 minute run around headed to a local store. They were baffled, called customer service. After about 30 mins I was told ok my account was closed and no further charges would be incurred. Fast forward a month later I get a bill. I pay it because I want to have nothing to do with these lying, incompetent clowns. I then call customer service. I get jerked around but finally am told my account  is closed and no further charges will be incurred. 
So from start to finish it was a total clown show.
If you’re a thinking about switching. Don’t.

T-Mobile has terrible cell coverage, especially in the Southwest, AND the WORST customer service!  We chose to employ our "cancel at anytime" term in our contract and they still charged us for the following month.  We visited their store and called several times to clarify the overcharge and they couldn't answer our questions and concerns and refused to remedy the situation.  Instead, they referred us to their credit agency and threatened our credit rating.  We eventually won in arbitration and was awarded $1,000 for our hardship!

I had the worst experience with T-Mobile when I decided to switch from Metropcs. In November 2022, I ordered 4 SIM cards online (family plan) worth $152.43. UPS claims they left the package with the cards in the lobby of the building in NYC. I immediately reported to T-Mobile I did not get the package on the day I was supposed to receive the package (according to the tracking number) and called a few times after that day. Everytime I called T-Mobile customer service was extremely nice and guaranteed me they would refund me but they never did. A month later I still did not get a refund and instead I got a bill for the monthly service. That's when I found out someone activated one of the SIM cards and I could not even access the account because I did not have the code and or the phone number associated with the account. I had to go to the local store to validate my identity and only then I was able to suspend the account but I was left with the bill ($123.75). I called more than 10 times in total, and most of the calls last 1h or more. Finally, I was transferred to the fraud department and in order to file for a fraud claim a had to submit a police report. Since I am not currently in NY. I filed a report online which was completely ignored by the police and therefore, my t-mobile fraud claim was never accepted and I had to pay for the bill ($123.75).

As if that was not enough, since December I have been trying to dispute a charge for the month of October even though I only ordered the cards end of November. I called the 3 times for that and they said they will take care of issue (it is a system error), and I have to wait until the last billing cycle to update those charges and hopefully, I will be able to close the account end of this month. 

I heard T-Mobile has great coverage and I know people who have no complaints about them but I guess if you decide to join them, you should pray that you will never have an issue because it is clear their customer service (apparently nice) is not properly trained and don't know how to assist you. I don't understand why they activate the cards before shipping and why they did not immediately suspend the cards as soon as I called.

T-Mobile has the worst customer service! I was with them 20 years and then my son decided to take the account on his name and what a nightmare it was to change over! We were charged for equipment that we no longer owned and they are saying I have to pay for it when I was told to not worry about a year ago ughh...unbelievable! I will have my son closed our account real soon. THANK YOU T-MOBILE FOR THE WORST CUSTOMER SERVICE!!!!

I have experience with Sprint and Verizon where I've been with each over the course of 20+ years. And I decided to make the switch to Tmobile last May because the promotion they were offering at the time to trade in my Iphone X and Samsung S20 which would give us a monthly bill of $140. That was my entire reason for leaving Verizon. The onboarding experience as a new customer was horrible, and unorganized. They failed to inform of steps in mailing in our phones, and I was promised by the customer service lady that she would keep our promotion on. Months later my bill grew to $290 per month. After 1 hour explaining the situation I get transferred to a "manager" which I think is just a different person with no authority. Fixes my bill somehow and ensures me that it will take a couple billing cycles to catch up. The next bill I see is still $290, and call again having to explain the original issue all over again about 45min of that. They again blame it on them not receiving our mailed in phones on time and they cannot apply the promotion. So not only did I change to T Mobile for a promotion to turn in our old almost like new phones- we didn't get the promotion so the bill is double of what I was expecting to pay, and they kept our phones giving me a credit of $100 each for them! Which, is an outrage I would've kept my phones as back up or would've been able to sell for at least $500 each online. 
Their customer service reps use call scripts to sympathize with your situation by saying, I understand I've been (your situation here) there and I know how disappointing that is, HOWEVER blah blah we are unable to blah blah. They are not customer service they are corporate minions there to buffer all the upset customers in hopes to just get them off the phone not resolving any billing issues. 
A note on Cell Service:
I thought the phone service might be good since their merger with Sprint, but I was proven wrong it's still terrible dead spots everywhere and low signal. Verizon is still the king of excellent cell service. Now, I will happily go back to them and advise everyone else. As you read the comments they are true. Your billing will never be a consistent amount, and again you'll waste your time with bad customer service reps who seem incentivized to just get you off the phone with pandering call scripts.

Do not get fooled into joining T-Mobile they only care about $$ Not long term quality and serivces. 1# Phone last 1 and half with new updates that slows your phone to purchase new expensive 1 #2 bad connections and charges you extra for unkown things #3 new phone releases every year don't purchase one until the latest one

A 0 need to be added to the ratings. T- mobile/ Sprint is horrible!! Customer service is ridiculous! They keep you on hold forever! My service and my sister service was suspended in the same night and we're Not on the same plan!! It was the carrier T-MOBILE suspending service for who knows why!! This happened in the middle of the night on 3 occasions. Not only that, the service is slow. Calls get dropped and I had to restart my phone more than twice a week!! I went to another carrier! BYE T-MOBILE/SPRINT!

T-Mobile is pure trash! I used to talk mad ish about Verizon because they were bad. So, I switched to T-Mobile & to a S22 phone and what a mistake that has been! These pink pussies are pink for a reason... they funking suck! I will NEVER EVER EVER & EVER AGAIN use T-Mobile as a carrier after this experience! I can't express to anyone as to how much I absolutely HATE T-Mobile! Funking absolutely horrid carrier! FUNK-OFF T-MOBILE!!! You just lost a family of cell & data usage!

*yall know what the "ish's" & "funks" SHOULD be but T-Mobile doesn't want customers to be able to express themselves as to the way they truly feel!* Eat a Dk!

Yours Truly,
Angry Customer

There is customer service staff who is responsible for taking care getting back old number back. Her name is  Joanna ID14545 for NTC department in philphas. She picked up my phone in night club, which is so ridiculous. I was barley heard her voice.
Absolutely terrible internet if you're trying to play any video games of any kind. Figure out your ipv6 and ipv4 modem/router trash combo.

T mobile advertises this Jump trade program. I decided to take advantage of this program. I traded my iPhone 13 in on a 14 plus. I received the plus and sent my 13 back with the label that THEY provided. It went back to them via USPS. I followed the tracking and long story short it was delivered to T- mobile. Well now they can't locate the device. They have done several searches with no luck in locating it. Meanwhile I am still paying for this phone and even after sending proof of delivery from the post office they are still holding me responsible for this phone. I have had several reps tell me well you have to wait at least 4 billing cycles to see if it shows up, so I continue to pay for this phone until they realize that someone in their company either lost or stole the phone. Unbelievable crock. I would definitely rethink using T mobile as your carrier. Ridiculously expensive and their coverage isn't really all that great. In addition, the reps have no idea what they are doing. This situation has been going on for over a month now. T mobile should be ashamed of themselves. For the money they charge. it's ridiculous.
Awful customer service! Nothing makes sense and they are constantly stealing money from you. Worst phone company!

T-Mobile customer service in Lehigh Acres, lee Blvd. FL. office are a bunch of liars, thief and will put you in financial bondage. RUN!!! there are cheaper phone plans and better services from other companies. 6 months of lies lies bill changing every month worst cell phone plan I ever had.
I’m into my third year with T-Mobile and it’s nothing but a freaking headache!!! I will never renew my contract and I definitely do not recommend this service to anyone ‼️

The T-Mobile store on Lincoln St. In Boston had outstanding customer service. It's been closed and customers have been referred to 350 Washington St. The service there is so bad that it could be Verizon. If you've been recruiting based on bad attitude, you've succeeded.

I signed up for T Mobile. This was about a year ago now. I spent hours and hours with rep after rep because I could not get the service I signed up for . Finally I just gave up. I was signed up for the 50 and older plan. They claimed I owed for 3 lines which I did not and the amount was for more than the agreed amount. The woman I talked to was like a robot just repeating I oe the bill. . I avoided them. Then I accidentely answered the phone one day and it was them. I sargued with them for a while and the woman finally told me if I paid 60.00 my account would be settledand I would not go to collections.  I paid just to be done with them. I recently tried to get a tablet with them because sprint is t mobile now and could not. They still say I owe a large balance , will not tell me the details or send a statement , Just like a robot again. You owe , you owe is all they say. Rep finally hung up on me. Do not do business with them. You will regret it.

edits.text:
if I could give -1 star i Would. i signed up because a "friend" told me how 'good' they were. So much for word of mouth. and friends. They talked me into the plan for 2 phones for 70.00 sounded good. Well, they checked. excellent coverage for my area. Wtby ,southbutry etc. Great I signed up. After hours (and I mean hours of them trouble shooting and trying to fix my problem( I had no service ) and 3 sim cards later ) a man with t mobile said "well you have 2 g coverage. WHAT!!! It was not the sim card-it was not my phone- 2G coverage!!! do I need to explain this to anyone? Then they still wanted to Hook me up with some device to get service in my home!! Who out there uses a cell phone exclusively for home???? no hands? i thought so. Finally they conceded to "let me go" with buyers remorse. What? my only remorse was that i was seriously misled!!! They said I could use at&T's towers while out on the road. REALLY? At&T do you have your towers properly marked for this? Then i would have to hook up to it. I told them they were insane. I was not going to "hook up"with towers as I drove and check maps on whose tower i was near plus pay them for internet services? Does anyone see where this is going -their desperation??? would you do this. Would you be insulted that T mobile suggested you do this??? I was and I am. Yet they did. And to carry  piece of equipment around (where? on my back) with my phone to connect? Insane!! I thought technology was much more advanced than that!!! Well,at the end of my conversation with the representative she said" thank you for trying T-Mobile". I was infuriated!! thanking me for what?? My wasted time of literally hours on the phone waiting or being told we had to trouble shoot? i had done this at least 4 times already. Needless to say , my patience was gone by this time. 
Bottom line with t mobile at least if they say good coverage ask if it is 2G ( this still exists??? I guess it does) 3G or 4G) I believe now they are working on 5G. They say good coverage but not that it is 2G coverage which won't even stay connected!!! T mobile you worked  for this review ad you deserve it!!!!! I left my email and nam,e. I don't care if you know who wrote this review. You should know who will be telling everyone they know about you.!!!!

text: TMobile was the worst experience ever on both Phone and Home internet. Phone bill Is so high, I'm paying $89 for one line and their Home 5G internet for $50 the worst home internet in the planet it's slower than my grandma. I will never ever in my life do business with TMobile it's just Bad business

Once my bill was paid, customer service went on break. Unable to resolve the issue with adjusting billing date that I have had from my first day of service.  BTW well over there ridiculously long 6 month waiting period.

We have 3 phones 3 watches and have been with them 3 1/2 years. At first their cellular service was decent for the money. I decided to try their wireless home internet which was good for 2 months and now it shuts down every day in the evening during high volume. Our phones also started dropping calls and not  connecting on out going. Their service so called techs are nice but tell us they’re upgrading the tower be patient for a month. Have waited almost two and no change. They obviously are overselling their capacity. Most likely will look elsewhere.
Their people on chat had a number next to their names.  For that, I will give them 3 stars.  More companies should do this.

HOURS spent on the phone.  It has been a NIGHTMARE.  The first girl, extremely over the top friendly, and i felt like we were best friends.  Turns out she added a "free" extra line to my phone - that i didn't need or ask for. I was NOT to be billed for it; neither for the free insurance she put on.  She said 'don't worry, your bill WON'T be that total...' ok. Fine.  I had to hop on another call to sort THAT out and ask them to remove the second line I didn't ask for /want/need, because they WERE going to charge me for it. 

next, I wanted to change my phone number from the assigned one they gave me.  So, after an hour on the phone, it's concluded that my new chosen phone number will be active in a few hours give or take; and I'll receive a confirmation text then turn off/on my phone and bada boom. NOPE. Nothing.  So I text 611. they say OH it takes 24 hrs.  Nope. Nothing after 24 hrs.  I call back.  New agent says that the line can't be added.  It's not available. WHAT?? After all this hassle and time, and now the number can't be added? I asked if it's just not available because it's in fact on hold...for Me and he just can't see that info? HE confirms oh maybe that's correct; confirms with another person in office.  So then ok all a go again.  Then I wait again. NOTHING, no text activation.  I text 611.  the number can't be changed to the number I spent an hour plus choosing and sorting out on the phone with the agent. 

It is so ANGERING and frustrating to waste my time on the phone and have absolutely NOTHING go as expected or as promised.  I do not understand how you train your agents to be friendly and over the top on the niceness, but inept at actually doing what they say they will do.  I don't need your phony niceness, I need things to work, to get what you said you would do for me, and to not have to spend ANY MORE TIME on these phone issues.  

None of your agents were consistent and all seemed to have different ideas on how this or that thing works, or what was written in my notes.  

I think after 8 years with t mobile, it's time to switch companies.

T-Mobile has the worst customer service and not safe to share your personal information like giving your credit card information. I got asked for my credit card information and my home address while asking for help to connect my old iPhone to the newest Iphone. I noticed after I gave my information that wasn't needed, so I hanged up and called my bank straight to freeze my account and requested a new card. I recommend to go in person to the nearest T-mobile store for any assistance.
Why don't you tell T-Mobile to be honest

I bought a prepaid Samsung phone from T- Mobile for a business line thinking it was a less expensive way to go for my start-up. However, I realized shortly after that pre-paid customers get zero service. The T-Mobile app does not work for pre-paid phones so it's just bloatware. I also had great difficulty in accessing any online accounting, and even though I was finally able to set up monthly billing to ensure my line was active, they still turned the phone off after the first month. It was such a hassle trying to get the account active again, I just ended up using a second line on my Verizon account. 

For folks that depend on less expensive, no credit required, pre-paid service, t-mobile is a disservice. Shame on them for the low level care they give this tier of customer.

I really hope I can give them negative reviews. Their system error messed up my bill, and they insist charging you the extra fees was valid. Plus, their customer services will never admit what the other representative just said or promised. They will put a notice under your account, and form a team to cheat and play with you instead of solving the issue.

I signed up for internet unlimited and 17 days after I signed up my internet died. I called customer service ( expert service a joke). They advised  my 100 gs were gone. I advised that I signed up for unlimited. They stated it was not available in my area. That was what I signed up for. They upgraded my service to the next plan for 180 gs. It ran out today Tuesday Feb. 1. I disconnected today and will never use their horrible service again

It would be 5 stars if if wasn't - 
Emergency Notifications are currently based on location ONLY.  I.E. It only works if you location tracking is on and if you happen to be physically within the area affected by the Emergency Notification.  
THAT IS FLAWED.
1- I may live in NYC but be away and in Chicago, that does NOT mean I do not want to be notified about an eminent threat happening at home!  
2- I SHOULD be able to subscribe, turn on, or opt in for Emergency notifications for a specific area - like my home, my parents home, my business.  I SHOULD NOT need to physically be in that location to be notified.  
3- MY LOCATION TRACKING SHOULD NOT NEED TO BE ON!  While that may be one way to disseminate the information, it shouldn't exclude anyone not sharing their location or anyone else wanting the information.
The location tracking unfortunately is not only used for Emergency notification.  And it requires that we allow companies like Google to continue to gather, sell, and use our information- even if we are otherwise doing everything to prevent that.

Perfect example - True story.  I was moving to Houston, TX for work and buying a house.  I returned home to Boston for the weekend and my Realtor phoned me in a panic about a storm that was wreaking havoc upon my new neighborhood.  And then asked why I was oblivious to it.  
Simple, it was sunny when I left, the forecast was for great BBQ weather all weekend.  I was not glued to the television and had there been an Emergency notification sent out - I wasn't in harms way, so supposedly shouldn't care.  That was Tropical Storm Alison, which caused more damage than any disaster in the country.

People should not be forced to share their location to receive emergency notices, nor should they need to be within the emergency affected area to want or require to be informed.  It should be a simple opt-in by zip code.  Easy to turn on or off for as many areas as they have a need or responsibility for.

PLEASE STEP UP AND LEAD.  Stop the sheep mentality that allows us to herding us into the data predatory dens of companies such as Google.  You may not be able to fix everything, but this is one thing you CAN FIX.  Show T-mobile customers and the world that T-mobile does care about us.  It's FREE and it's not even Tuesday!

Trying to sign up because Verizon's prices are so high, but my first experience on the phone was with someone with an accent so bad I couyldn't understand. Decided to visit the store in person, and was completely ignored for 20 minutes with zero acknowledgement from either employee. Walked out, no goodbye even. If thios is customer servicew I don't need it. Reading these reviews, I dodged a bullet. What is the matter with these companies? When did they stop giving a single crap?

Horrible company. I tried their internet and was offered phone service if I liked the internet. I didn’t like the internet and sent the box back 2 days after receiving it. They refunded me. I never even got the phone service but they started charging me for it. I called and explained and they fought me on it. Still trying to collect for a service I never even had

Worst cell phone company out there. They charged my credit card without my authorization over $600.00. They gave me a cell phone booster over 8 years ago that of course does not longer work. The booster is obsolete, discontinued and but just because I switched to ATT they charged my credit card without my authorization. Their customer center is in the Philipines and their employees will keep on the phone for hours without doing anything about it. They end their phone by saying "I will escalate it to the back office" Which means they can do crap about it. Extremely frustating and just to think I gave them my money for over 10 years!.

I had trouble from the beginning with billing.  I was promised a free phone by a rep who did not have the authority to do it ….he basically lied then every month I had to fight for the charges to be reversed.  After 4 months, I got tired of it and cancelled my service, returned the phone.  Then they want yo charge me $894 for the phone.  They took it out of my account through auto pay so now I am fighting to get that money back so I can pay my rent!
Reps don’t listen , tell you something different every time and don’t put notes in your account.  I don’t trust them

This is my review in Reston Virginia.  The signal strength is not good in my neighborhood shopping areas. I am not able to use my phone in some of my neighborhood shopping places as there is no signal or weak wireless signal.

edits.text: Very bad service.  I have unlimited international plan with Tmobile but they charge and take 100s of dollars from my account and every time I call them they said resolved but this issue is continued over 3 months, 5 times called so far. It looked TMobile do not know billing.

text:
I had thought this was a good experience you might too but wait till you get your bill and find out how much your getting ripped off I will not return to this store actually the service s***s & honestly I’m sorry I even switched they will s*** you into everything and tell you no no your bill won’t change but oh it so does and that GATEWAY INTERNET IS WORTHLESS…….. YOU CAN TAKE IT OR LEAVE IT BUT I AM PAYING OFF MY STUFF AND LEAVING & BTW CUSTOMER SERVICE WAS AWESOME BUT THEY AREN’T THE ONES IN THE STORE SELLING YOU YOUR EQUIPMENT MAKING PROFIT OFF OF PEOPLE THAT REALLY DON’T KNOW BETTER YEA CAN YOU TELL I AM NOT A HAPPY CUSTOMER WITH T MOBILE PEOPLE PRETTY SURE THEY WON’T LAST LONG 
Winter Haven Florida

T Mobile Only wants your money.
T mobile travel is a total joke, They basically just give you some 'deals' and when anything goes wrong, they can't and won't do anything about it. Go directly to the rental company instead of dealing with these jokers.

Beware T-Mobile Offer SCAM
This is Abhi (Customer since 2018),
I bought 1+1 offer Mobile phones from T-Mobile Store in December 2021. In Jan 2022 I called T-Mobile Customer Representative for removing extra lines which I was not using.!!!
I clearly confirmed with Customer representative that "Will I lose my offer if I cancel my un-used lines.?" Customer Representative informed me that "I will not loss the offer" and this was confirmed twice with 2 different Customer representatives. (How would I know T-Mobile agents will trick the customers!!!!)
After a month my billing cycles amount got increased around 35$ than the actual bill because the offer got cancelled!!!!

(This was big lie) -- They knew that once we remove the lines the offer will be done..! but they made us do Cancel the offer saying we will not lose the offer.
They don't want to take responsibility on this!!!!

We are making multiple calls to address this issue from March 2022, but every Customer representative said our ticket is under reviewing.so we need to wait.
Last month I Spoke with one Customer representative, we explained everything about our issue!!! so Customer Representative assured us they activated the offer back and from next billing cycling we will be seeing the reduced billing cycle,
but the refund of the amount from March 2022 which we are paying more the difference amount of refunding will be still under reviewing. We will call you in 3 working days with an update.
we waited for 1 month, but we did not receive any call.

(This was big lie) -- They mentioned my offered got activated which did not happened and 3 days call back which did not happened.

Now, it is time to pay our monthly bill due and I don’t see my bill got reduced. So, we called the Customer representative again today.!!!!
The Customer representative mentioned us "We cannot activate your offer because you cancelled your lines in which your offer got cancelled". So, we explained everything again and the representative transferred the call to the Senior representative.
We explained everything again, then even the senior representative mentioned "we cannot activate your offer because you cancelled your lines in which your offer got cancelled" and cannot refund the amount because you guys need to check the billing every month or at least once in 2 months. you had crossed the grace period for the refund!! Then I asked, if we check it every month and pay the bill why would we activate the auto payment. They are just saying I need to check because they have right to bill more.

Note:
We did not cancel the lines by our own. We made a call to you guys (T-Mobile Customer Representative) and we asked, "will I lose my Offer in cancelling the lines?" and T-Mobile Customer representative said "NO, you will not lose the offer" You are good.!!!!
But now they are saying I’m the one who cancelled but who helped us without knowledge on this?????
Which is Lie and which is truth.
Please T-Mobile Training department learn the employees how to take responsibility on the problems they create
BEWARE of the Auto Payment SCAM:
The senior customer representative mentioned on the call that its customers responsibility every month to check if they are billing correctly or not, if you do not check your bills monthly looks like they will have a right to bill you more and if not reported within 2 months that will be continued for rest of the time you are with the provider.

Concern:
The Senior Customer Representative does not want to take any responsibility for the mistakes what they had done. They are saying that it is customer's responsibility to follow up on the billing and charges and it is customer mistake to cancel the offer.

This is purely scamming the Customers!!!! Lies, lies, lies from the beginning, Customer representatives keep telling lies on all the things.

I don’t know what ethics they are following in cheating the customer.!!!

If the customer representative says If I cancel the lines, I will lose my offer then why would I do that. In the offer I’m paying 35$ for 1+1 phone. Why would I remove the offer and pay 70$ for 2 phones? That is logical.!! and I don’t know why most of the calls not recorded or notes written by the customers representatives’ lot of missing pieces.
Nobody trained properly, Customer representative mentioned me I should know the offers what will offers does and what it does not!!! I don’t understand who is training these professional representatives.
Please some from T-Mobile (Good responsible person) help me providing a proper solution on this issue!
I want my Offer and Money back!!!

I called to see what deals they could offer me to pull me over to T-Mobile. According to their website they're offering to pay off your contract up to $800. I gave the agent over the phone my IMEI number. Didn't seem very active to retain me as a possible customer. She was very rude she spoke broken English, and came back to tell me that my phone was not eligible for the buyout plan. But after reading about the reviews regarding T-Mobile. I'm kind of glad I didn't switch over! Not impressed with your customer service at all! If that's how their customer service operates I can imagine just how the company itself operates!

Brian at T-Mobile store number 601E made my experience unbelievably outstanding and I recommend him to anyone looking for a phone plan if they want to experience the best service possible by a representative of T Mobile.  Thank you again Brian.          Chad and Sandra

As a 23 year customer , I find the run arounds , misinformation and lack of any follow ups disheartening! Trying to add another " line " was an exercise in futility ; after 3 weeks I gave up ! One can NEVER follow up with the rep that assists you originally. Even a supervisor , who assures you if you reach that office ( Hanna , Tampa Bay , Fl ) and ask for her " everyone there knows her " NOT SO ! Twice, I reached that office and neither of the two knew who she was . One informed me that if I took the defective modem that t-mobile sent me to one of their retail stores , they would exchange it . NOT SO! If one by chance reach their call center in the Philipines , the frustration compounds ; they are difficult to understand and misdirect one further ! Furthermore , depending who you speak with , I was given quotes of $55 , 30 and 25 for the additional line.  As a last resort , I emailed their president and immediately I receive a response from a Andrew Sanchez ( sr. specialist , team ceo ) who after a couple of patronizing  emails and NEVER addressing my concerns ghosted me . After another email to Sievert's office , a Shauna Bailey ( coach , team ceo and Sanchez' supervisor ) calls me , then when I followed up with an email , she failed to respond back ! 
This is a company that is all show and NO ACTION ! Soon , I will sever my remaining line with them .

T - Mobile is a brand used by the mobile communications subsidiary of the German telecommunications company Deutsche Telekom AG. The brand is active in Austria (under the subsidiary T-Mobile Australia. T-Mobile is the best network so far for me, am satisfied with the fast your loyal customer base is outstan empathy towards customer problems, i strongly recomend it. services lately.

Had T-Mobile for almost 9 years, and it’s taken a nose dive in quality and service to the point of it being unusable. Once I even had a customer service rep scream at the top of his lungs at me because I asked for a manager. Between that and constant dropped calls, I just can’t anymore. Their logo should read, “cheap prices at ALL costs.” Honestly, I would rather get ripped off by Verizon, at least they deliver on everything else.

i've been using T-Mobile for past few month, it is the best network so far for me, am satisfied with the fast internet services lately. They have shown great empathy towards customer problems, strongly recommend it.
Poor customer service. Crap coverage. When they were Sprint, they were great

I have or had t mobile. These guys are not worth your time. They will lie to your face and in the store and talking to them on the phone. I made payment arrangement after being told we had international calls to German. They lied never added it on. Then never attempted to resolve the issue. They wanted to blame the customers for their people lying about the plans, and doing their jobs.

Experience the unbeatable power of T-Mobile! With a wide range of services, T-Mobile will help you stay connected, no matter where you are. From reliable 4G LTE data to unlimited talk and text, T-Mobile is the perfect choice for all your wireless needs. So don't wait - take advantage of T-Mobile, today!

When I called for internet service from T-Mobile, I was sold a promo Samsung A13 mobile phone that has never worked properly. I complained numerous times and 22 days after receiving the phone I said I wanted to send it back. (it was at Christmas time so I was busy with other things). They said it was outside of the "Buyer's remorse" period so that I couldn't send back the phone, and the only choice was to send me another phone, which they did. The second phone was even worse, and couldn't even be set up. I've tried to cancel service and send back both phones, because I've wasted about 40 hrs on the phone with them trying to make things work, but they say they can cancel service, but I will have to pay for the phone (which was a promo for getting service with them). I've asked to be escalated to someone who has the authority to waive the "buyers remorse" period, but I'm told that nobody has that authority and the only thing they can do is send another phone. I would just like to send back the phone and not be charged for it, and not have cell service with T-Mobile. They promised me cheaper prices, but it's costing me much more, has wasted a ton of time, and I'm stuck. Get cell service with someone else!

Having cancelling my service in Sept due to poor service in house after only one week of service (or lack of service) I cancelled and T-Mobile is charging for for a full month of service, termination fee, plus numerous hidden charges.  Basically after 1 week of being a T-Mobile customer that have charged me almost 200.00!!  Really for 1 week of poor reception. BEWARE

T-mobile telesales lied over and over. We went into a store and because stores work on commission, they wouldn't help us. After 3 hours on the phone getting nowhere, my husband went to another store and spoke with a manager who attempted to help. Telesales sent the wrong phone, wrong screen covers, wrong protector. Lied about activation charges (said they were waived). Our phones were not free, our bill was double what it was supposed to be and again, after wasting 2 hours on the phone, we are ready to turn everything in and walk away. $200 promotion per line we ported in - after being told over and over we qualified, today they told is we didn't. This has fraud and FCC complaint written ALL over it. Run, don't listen to anyone from T-mobile. Total shitshow.

If I could give zero stars I would. Tmobile Customer Service has gone way downhill. No one speaks clear English nor do they comprehend what you are saying. It is taking me 2 months so far to get a refund for a phone I returned 2 months ago. Each CSR or "play" Supervisor ensures me that the issue has been escalated and will be resolved within 24 hours, however, I am still calling and the issue is not resolved. Today I call and they are talking about a phone line that has nothing to do with the return. A whole big MESS!! Once this is resolved, I will be switching carriers.
Great and excellent service from Tmobile company. Im too satisfied with their service on time and solution for my issues tq🥰

we have not had t-mobile for 2 months now.  we completed our contract before going elsewhere for cell phone service.  They are still taking money out of our account every month.  tried to contact them about this issue and they cannot help me because we are no longer active customers.  what a rip off.  have to cancel card being used and get a new card.  they should be reported.

They never listened to my request. I want to close my account.  They referred me to Tech Specialist and then on to the engineering team.  Trying to FIX a problem?  I want my account closed.   Never, never addressed my request.  

The transcript of our Chat....

Terrible company, had their service for about a week and cancelled and they still tried to charge me for the entire month, I had to call and spend hours on the phone to get handled, first customer service rep said they would call me back and they never did, had to call again. Crappy service and crappy cell coverage why would anyone switch ever, best to stay with good cell service from Verizon and Att

I had the best experience on my phone call today with Zoe! I had bad service with my first attempt to fix the issue I was having and was told they couldn’t and wouldn’t help me. I gave it another try today and Zoe helped me and solved my problem, after I was told they couldn’t do anything,I called again today and spoke with  Zoe who helped me so much today and did such an amazing job! Thank you Zoe you were amazing!!

T-mobile was willing to lose a 10 year customer over $100 charge that was broken down into $7 a month payments..
When I visited the T-Mobile store back in August one of the regional managers came in and talked me into getting a small business account.. she said nothing would change, but I would get a free tablet and free Netflix every month.. That sounds great, but we found our that you have to pay for the line, and you can never get the free Netflix because it's so complicated it was nearly impossible for anyone to figure it out, including the T-Mobile employees. 
So I canceled the business account within a couple months, and now they call it buyers remorse. I still have to pay for the tablet which I tried to return in the 1st place and they wouldn't accept it back so now I'm stuck paying $7 a month for a tablet that we never used..
If T-Mobile was willing to lose a 10 year customer over a $100 bill then they're not who I thought they were..
I'm ready to change providers!

T-Mobile has effectively crippled it's customer service abilities. I can no longer use the online app to pay off my equipment. I was on over 2 hour phone calls four times this year because T-Mobile couldn't get my account transferred to a business account and kept charging me for my old one. They have me paying through the nose for a phone that doesn't work but will cost me MORE money to replace. They also put the wrong EIN in for our business and so when I call they tell me I don't have the correct information. I now have to hunt down that false EIN (it was supposed to be fixed over a year ago) to be able to even access my OWN ACCOUNT! ...and good luck getting an English speaker if you speak English. It's almost become a dead language I think! To T-Mobile...we have been customers for about 20 years now. Parting is such sweet sorrow...especially when I try to call and am put on hold only to be told 20 minutes later my CORRECT tax id number is WRONG. Go figure. I now have the bad number and will be calling T-Mobile back to hopefully complete my cancelation.
UPDATE: I was able to reach a very helpful customer service rep with TM. He was a bit surprised we were leaving. He kept saying what good customers we've been. How we always pay our bills and have been good business associates. I felt bad. It wasn't his fault. He just works for a company that doesn't care much anymore.

The ABSOLUTE WORST PHONE COMPANY IN THE NATION… PLEASE READ THE REVIEWS AND BELIEVE THEM. THE CEO OF THIS CRAP OF A CARRIER SHOULD BE ASHAMED OF EVER SHOWING OR TELLING ANYBODY THEY ARE CEO OF THIS CRAP OF A CARRIER. 5g COVERAGE IS WHAT THEY ADVERTISE, BEST IN THE NATION. (What a joke) the service (if you can get service) is so hit and miss, you might as well not even have a phone. And WHATEVER you do. DO NOT…DO NOT… UPGRADE A PHONE WITH THIS CRAP OF A CARRIER. YOU WILL BE STUCK 24 months paying FOR SERVICE THAT YOU CANT EVEN USE. I WILL CONTINUE TO BASH THIS CRAP OF A COMPANY UNTIL MY 24 months that I was lied to about is OVER. and when that day comes!!! It will be a CELEBRATION LIKE NONE OTHER. THIS CEO NEEDS TO READ REVIEWS, AND THIS CRAP OF A CARRIER SHOULD BE SHUT DOWN AND PUT ALL OVER EVERY NEWS COVERAGE IN THE NATION!!!

edits.text: RUN RUN RUN RUN RUN. AND PLEASE EVERYBODY…TELL EVERYBODY THAT YOU KNOW…LETS PUT THESE LIARS OUT OF BUSINESS. 21 yr sprint customer and less than 1 month T-Mobile customer and it’s the worst cell service I’ve ever had. Please…EVERYBODY…TELL EVERYBODY THAT YOU KNOW. RUN RUN RUN FROM T-MOBILE AND LETS ALL SHUT THEM DOWN!

text:
Absolutely the worst customer service I have experienced. Came for the free umbrella and along with the other eight or more people waiting outside in the cold, because it was no room inside, were totally ignored by the staff for almost 30 minutes.
Asked if we can just get them and leave, in response got yelled by TMobile staff.
Location  in OW, Maryland. 
Strongly considering switching to another provider.

T-Mobile absolutely sucks, stay as far away from this joke of a company as you can. My son who is currently in the navy serving overseas has been charged repeatedly for an account that has been closed months ago. I called their worthless customer service number to get this rectified but was told that only the account holder can cancel an account. I told them that my son is in the middle of the ocean on deployment and is unable to speak to anyone for the next 3 months. They didn’t care and have done nothing to help remedy this situation so they are going to continue to charge my son money for a service that he isn’t even getting. You absolutely suck T-Mobile, way to rise above and screw a military man serving this country. You’re pathetic and a disgrace of a company. My advice is stay far far away from this company, if they’re willing to treat an active military person like this just think how the rest of you will be treated.

My iPhone locked up so I went to T Mobile thinking I needed to get a new phone anyway. I got the new iPhone 14 and joined their service. The customer service is the worse! I still don't have the $400 credit promised for my phone almost 4 months ago! I get the run around, and every time I go in there it takes 90 minutes to get anything done. When I called customer service, the rep called the store and the manager said there was an incident and I was not allowed in the store! Seriously? Where did she get this stuff from? Then I called and talked to the same manager and she had my phone there STILL. She said I have to come pick it up and ship it in myself!  They have no idea what they are doing and never have enough staff to support anyone properly. I wish I had never switched and will switch back as soon as I can! Sorry, I gave you guys a try.

Text interaction was fruitless. The interaction with "Joseph" took two hours and still did not answer my question or properly address the issue.  The website is deceiving regarding international calls on the Magenta plan.

We were sold T-Mobile internet and switched our phones as well.  We were guaranteed fast internet speed and told we were in 5G area. Received modem and plugged it in and got no signal. Called T-mobile and they advised we were not in 5G area and it would not work for us. I guess sales person works on commission and wanted a sale. Phone lines were a real problem canceling. Took over an hour and girl would not take no for answer. She told us to expect bill for $190 for usage. We did not use one minute of TMobile time. Very disappointing service

I have an account with tmobile and recently my phone quit working for me. I called tmobile and they ordered a new phone for me since this one is under warranty. I have now been to the store three times, three calls to tmobile, and two calls transferred to tech support. The store is saying that they are not able to do anything as this is an issue with the system, but techs are saying that is a quick fix that the store manager can do. All I need to do is to pay 5 dollars for the warranty to receive a replacement phone. Three different cards have been used and tmobile system does not accept, but it did work to pay 100.50 on the bill. So finally all that they were able to do is cancel this order and hopefully I should receive a new order tomorrow. The run around that I have been given and the price of tmobile plan for a really crappie service is ridiculous. The fact that constantly the line drops and mobile internet does not always work in locations around the city, tmobile should be ashamed for ripping people off. Service is going down the hill at ridiculous speeds.

I switched to other carriers, and they charged more than my monthly payment. I called 4 times trying to get my money back. However, every person gives me a different answer in the end. NEVER USE TMOBILE!!!!!!

Terrible customer service.  Agents don't speak average English  and don't comprehend what you say to them. 1 out of 20 will actually be helpful. Often they make numerous mistakes and screw up things which take several calls to correct.

The absolute worst customer experience with the worst support ever. I switched and will drop them after less than a week. Total crap. I have been online and on chat for over 8 hours in the first week. Biggest waste of time in my life. Do not go with tMobile.
I have been on hold for over a 2 hours. If i wanted to play music i would turn on the radio. T-Mobile raised my bill over$100 with no explanation.

The worst cell phone company I’ve ever dealt with in my life.  I had cell phone service with them for 1 week and canceled due to horrible reception service.  Since then they have charged me for an entire month of service even though repeatedly I was told by their customer service team that the charges would be waived.  Now, since they didn’t follow through on what they said they would do, they’ve sent the charges to a credit bureau.  I’ve been calling them for months, was lied to repeatedly, was given the runaround and now they’re attempting to attack my credit.  This has been THE worst customer service and cell phone company I’ve ever dealt with!

I am going to be 65 in March and I have never in my lifetime dealt with such extreme LIARS. Went to the a T-Mobile store in Naples on Black Friday and was given this great deal to get my business from Verizon. Turns out I was LIED to by the manager of the store and Customer Service said go to the store and deal with them. So now I am paying an extra $65 per month because I was LIED to.  STAY AWAY DO NOT DEAL WITH T-MOBILE   THEY ARE ALL LIARS!!!!!!!!!!!!   IF THEY GIVE YOU A GREAT DEAL MAKE SURE YOU GET IT IN WRITING !!!!!!!!!!!!!!    T-LIARS-MOBILE.

This is my first time ever writing a review about any company because of how horrible they are. The T-Mobile customer agents are dishonest and poorly trained. If I could give less than one star, I would . Terrible company. go somewhere else. Anywhere. I dont think it gets any worse. Had several lines with them and ended up canceling.

I went to Tmobile store to exchange my old 4G and get a free 5G phone and found out there is nothing is free and they offer a $40 monthly payment for one year to get a new phone . 
why this cpmpany keeps lying to trick their costumers .

I got help at TMobile that is located at 1818 3rd Ave.  Great Falls I have had T-Mobile coverage for my phone for several years but just got internet coverage today.  I was very satisfied with Jonny's help.  I was having difficulty changing my internet on my computer but he got me up and running!! I would give the whole store a 10!

I have been a T-Mobile customer for over 15 years.  Up until the last 3-4 years, I have been satisfied with the service and customer service.  Over the last few years, their customer service has really gone down hill.  The customer service reps and mangers are unhelpful, unknowledgeable and liars - telling me request I have made, and were approved for, in the past were never allowed, and that there is not a human employee at T-Mobile that can approve, or accommodate my request (despite past action and approval).  I would NOT recommend T-Mobile to anyone.  I will be dropping service with T-Mobile as soon as I am able to do so. I suggest to all with current service through T-Mobile to drop their service before they railroad you into a situation you can't get out of like they have done with me.

I had a bad experience with the  T-mobile on arrington rd/Hwy 6.  I can't believe how bad customer service is now, they don't care about  pleasing the customer anymore.  It all started with the merge of sprint/T-Mobile.  It's not about the customer anymore, its about only how much they can make.  My service in my home has been bad and it's actually in every home I've lived in.  My phones have been troubled shot and I still can't receive good reception.  I just wish the service was good for the money that I am paying monthly!!

Since January 1 2023 t mobile have not answer the phone ! The stores don’t help you no more they only sell phones and say contact t mobile directly when no one answer the phones ! They make you want half hour to hour just to hang up the phone! Bad enough I can’t change my plan , number or remove an mine that someone else place in my account until someone answer been calling since the first of January this suck tmobile lost me as a customer

Tmobile customer service sucks !!!!I'm disgusted with the service . I've been a customer for 7 years and now they lost me as a client . Everybody needs to make money but if your going to have another country run your business they need to know what they are doing . 7 people couldn't get one thing correct . I was lied too put on hold for 45 mins second time 30 mins . I don't need crappy service I need the best I guess thats why they say Verizon is . Im heading to them .see you tmobile your loss

T-Mobile refuses to take responsibility for phone malfunction after SW upgrade. So I upgraded the A71 Android device yesterday. After the upgrade, I lost connection to the T-Mobile network. Contacted the T-Mobile technical support. No luck there as they tried all they could. They recommended that I take the device to  the T-Mobile store located at Grand Pkwy and Bellaire in Richmond TX. Not the pleasant experience. Instead of trying to resolve the issue they simply refused to take any responsibility.  They replaced the SIM chip but it did not work. Then they suggested that either I reset with the factory reset which would wipe all the data or upgrade the device. And even the factory reset was no guarantee that it would work. The store employees basically refused to take any responsibility for the device malfunction after SW upgrade. In plain words they literally said that I can take it anywhere else if I don't like it, and it's not the T-Mobile's responsibility that my device would not work after the upgrade. They said SW was done by Samsung. When I tried to reason that it was the T-Mobile network and device which was impacted, they simply turned turned away. 
I called the customer service again and as a last resort, tried the factory reset. No luck either. So now I have no mobile network.

Worst customer support !! 
Worst instore support !!
Due to the mistake from the store person of not adding the promotion for newly acquired phone, I have to pay 1000$ extra. 
Spent more than 5hours on the phone to get the issue resolved but the incometency of TMobile customer care team really needs mention here. It feels like the greatest mistake from me was to choose TMobile as my mobile carrier.
The TMobile store is robbing and cheating customers in broad daylight.
Shameful from TMobile!!

If I could give T-Mobile a zero I would. The customer service reps are rude. They will not unlock my phone that is paid for and then when I call to try to unlock it they said I have to get a plan arrive for 30 days and then they will unlock it. I see why everyone hate T-Mobile. Verizon is way better

We switched to T-mobile as they oferred $200 rebate for each number, $100 rebate for switching internet and 20% off for life (insider email promo). Two months later and numerous hours with their customer service later NOTHING that they promised was done! This is illegal practice. Please people do yourself a favor and stay away from T-mobile like your life depends on it. This is how they steal your money and beat you down to it. Who has time to call them numerous times? The system is made to exhaust you and you give up on your own money. Now on the line with Doris and Briana from Albuquerque,NM is same thing all over again. They switch you here and there but the end result is the same they get to keep your money. Shame on you T-mobile!
Absolutely ridiculous hold times all the time!

I switched over to a family plan in august 2021, and billing was shifted to another account.   Unfortunately, there was an error on their end and they continued to bill me monthly on the old account, in addition to the new one, so we were getting double-charged.  I did not pick up on this until recently.  When all was said and done, they they deducted over $2600 from my account.  Customer support would not refund me the full amount - stating they have a 60 day refund policy.

Something tells me that if there was an error on my end, and somehow payment did not reach them for 2 years, they would be seeking payment for the full two years plus late fees, and me having a 'policy' of only paying for the past 60 days wouldn't go over very well.

They are no better than thieves in my book, and I will not be doing business with them moving forward.

I've been with the same cell phone company for over 30 years until last week.  I went into Store 5121 NC Hwy 42, Garner NC.  The manager of the store was so impressive with her knowledge base.  Her name is Jamillah B.  I thought I'd never leave my cell phone company, but after hearing what T-Mobile had to offer and the fact that I saved almost $70 a month with new plan, I was force (by common sense) to say bye-bye to the former company!  Of course, they were sorry to see me leave after being a loyal customer for so long, but it was time.  I'm elated, glad and overjoyed with my choices.  I have NO complaints and love the money I'm saving!  Thanks again Ms. Jamillah.
